data.current_summary: Create a snippet on shop side
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new JS/CSS/HTML snippet for delivery to the shop frontend. Accepts a Snippet object with the snippet content and configuration. Returns the created snippet with its assigned snippet_id and metadata. The snippet is immediately stored and available for frontend delivery.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Added clarity about snippet types (JS/CSS/HTML), what the operation accepts, what it returns (including snippet_id), and the side effect that the snippet becomes available for frontend delivery.

message: Operation 'get_data_v2_connections_connection_id_snippet_snippet_id' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, inconsistent_terminology, missing_output_details. Updated to clarify single-resource retrieval and added context about snippet content types.
